---
name: "❓ A concept or method question"
about: You'd like a method or term explained more, or a suggestion
title: "[question] <topic>"
labels: question
---

**Your question**
What would you like explained? (e.g. "why do we standardise before PCA?")

**Where does it come up?**
Which notebook or section prompted it, if any.

**How much ML background do you have?**
This helps us pitch the answer. (Total beginner is completely fine — this repo is for you!)
